geopolitics_summary: EU faces structural energy demand surge from AI/industry; China supply competition drives diversification policy; US-EU trade tensions over tariffs risk market fragmentation.

themes.headline: EU households to cut peak electricity use as industrial, AI demand surges
themes.why_it_matters: Structural upward pressure on EU power demand from AI datacenters and industry threatens grid capacity. Peak shaving mandates could raise day-ahead intraday volatility and flatten load curves; impacts Cal+1 pricing and reserve margin stress.

themes.headline: EU Commission exempts green capex from fiscal rules amid energy crisis
themes.why_it_matters: Accelerates renewable build and grid infrastructure investment. Eases fiscal constraints on member states' decarbonization capex, supporting medium-term power supply diversification away from fossil fuels. Positive for long-dated renewables; neutral near-term pricing impact.

themes.headline: Chinese firms aiding Russia face new EU sanctions wave
themes.why_it_matters: Escalates EU-China trade friction; risks retaliation affecting critical energy tech imports (solar, rare-earth magnets, EV batteries). Could constrain renewable capacity additions and indirectly support fossil fuel margins if green transition delays; also threatens LNG logistics via shipping disruption.

themes.headline: Global shipping prepares for permanent disruption, executives warn
themes.why_it_matters: Persistent supply-chain fragmentation threatens LNG import reliability and cost. Higher shipping premiums on spot LNG cargoes to NW Europe would elevate TTF via arbitrage; regional LNG tightness could spike power costs in gas-heavy regions.

themes.headline: EU trade chief pushes mandatory supply diversification tool for critical sectors
themes.why_it_matters: Targeted at chemicals and semiconductors; indirect power impact via industrial competitiveness and shift in energy-intensive manufacturing footprint. Could reduce EU industrial electricity demand if production migrates offshore, bearish for power; or raise capex for localized green capacity, bullish long-term.

watchlist: EU sanctions implementation timeline vs. China retaliation on solar/EV supply chain
Industrial electricity demand / AI datacenter facility announcements in EU; grid stress testing
US-EU trade truce durability; tariff escalation risk to green tech imports
Q3 2026 renewables auction calendar and fiscal rule exemption fund deployment
